text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 11 

BENE_SMI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS 

LABEL: Part B Months Count 

DESCRIPTION: Months of Part B coverage 

SHORT NAME: B_MO_CNT 

LONG NAME: BENE_SMI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12 

COMMENT: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary had Medicare Part B
